assertions.text: t[start .. start + len] == [t[start]] + t[start + 1 .. start + len]

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger t[i]} | start <= i < start + len :: t[i] == c
forall i: int {:trigger t[i]} | start <= i < start + len :: t[i] == c

assertions.text: forall j: int {:trigger t[j]} | x <= j < x + y :: t[j] == t[x]
